faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Windsor Terrace?
faqs.answer: Windsor Terrace's abundant trees, proximity to Prospect Park, and older building stock create ideal conditions for stink bugs. These pests are attracted to the warmth of homes during cooler months and easily find entry points through gaps in windows, doors, and the exterior walls common in pre-war Brooklyn construction.

faqs.question: What does stink bug control service include for $350-$550?
faqs.answer: Our stink bug control service includes a thorough inspection of your Windsor Terrace property, targeted treatment of affected areas, sealing of common entry points, removal of existing bugs, and exterior perimeter treatment. The price varies based on property size, infestation severity, and whether follow-up visits are needed.

faqs.question: When is stink bug season in Windsor Terrace?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs are most active in Windsor Terrace during late September through November when they seek indoor shelter for winter, and again in early spring (March-April) when they emerge. However, you may notice them year-round inside heated buildings where they've overwintered in wall voids or attics.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Windsor Terrace residents experiencing stink bug infestations. Our local Brooklyn technicians can typically reach your Windsor Terrace home within hours of your call, providing fast relief from these persistent and odorous pests.
